title: Some admins may see an error when removing blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.
impact: Admins may see an error when removing blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

updates.content:
Title: Some admins may see an error when removing blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

User impact: Admins may see an error when removing blocked users from the Restricted entities page in Microsoft 365 suite.

More info: Admins are unable to remove Restricted entities from the Microsoft Defender XDR portal, Exchange Online admin center, or PowerShell.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with removing blocked users from Microsoft Defender XDR, Exchange Online, or PowerShell, and we're checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.
